page.name: Loop Recorder

pad1.name: `sampler_bank 'Recordings Bank' ? sampler_loaded 1 auto ? get_text 'PLAY' : get_text 'REC' : get_text 'Activate'`
pad1.color: not sampler_bank "Recordings Bank" ? blink ? color red : color black : sampler_loaded 1 auto ? color green : color orange

page.pad1: not sampler_bank 'Recordings Bank' ? sampler_bank 'Recordings Bank' & show_splitpanel 'sideview' on : sampler_loaded 1 auto ? sampler_play 1 auto ? on & sampler_stop 1 auto : off & sampler_play 1 auto : off & loop on & sampler_rec 1 & loop off & repeat_start 'sample_loaded_1' 30ms 5 & sampler_loaded 1 auto ? repeate_stop 'sample_loaded_1' & sampler_play 1 auto : nothing

pad2.name: `sampler_bank 'Recordings Bank' ? sampler_loaded 2 auto ? get_text 'PLAY' : get_text 'REC' : get_text ' '`
pad2.color: not sampler_bank "Recordings Bank" ? color black : sampler_loaded 2 auto ? color green : color orange

page.pad2: not sampler_bank 'Recordings Bank' ? nothing : sampler_loaded 2 auto ? sampler_play 2 auto ? on & sampler_stop 2 auto : off & sampler_play 2 auto : off & loop on & sampler_rec 2 & loop off & repeat_start 'sample_loaded_2' 30ms 5 & sampler_loaded 2 auto ? repeate_stop 'sample_loaded_2' & sampler_play 2 auto : nothing
